item.title: Inazuma Eleven ‘INA-DAI’ live stream set for May 29
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Smartphone
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

The latest updates on Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road and Inazuma Eleven: Cross.

LEVEL-5 will host the Inazuma Eleven news live stream “INA-DAI” on May 29  at 4:00 a.m. PT / 7:00 a.m. ET / 21:00 JST, the company announced. You will be able to watch it on YouTube with English and Traditional Chinese subtitles.

The broadcast will share the latest updates on Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road and Inazuma Eleven: Cross.

Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam worldwide. Inazuma Eleven: Cross is due out for iOS and Android in June in Japan.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/inazuma-eleven-ina-dai-live-stream-set-for-may-29
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales details Age of Budding
item.content:encoded:
Publisher and developer Square Enix, and developer Claytechworks have released new information and screenshots for HD-2D action RPG The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales introducing the Age of Budding, as well as the recently released “Prologue” demo.

Get the details below.

■ Story

A Story of Four Ages across a Thousand Years

To lift the curse on Princess Heuria of Huther, Elliot and Faie will cross through the Doorway of Time to visit different periods in history.

They will travel from their own time, the Age of Safekeeping, further and further into the past. Across every age, a terrible threat looms over Elliot and Faie’s adventure.

—Age of Safekeeping: The Present

(Read more here.)

—Age of Reconstruction: The Dark Ages

(Read more here.)

—Age of Magic: A Golden Age

(Read more here.)

—Age of Budding: The Birth of Civilization

(Today’s update.)

■ Age of Budding

The Age of Budding is the period furthest back in time in Elliot and Faie’s adventure. Here, at the dawn of civilization, humans use weapons of their own making to keep the beast tribes at bay.

Within the precarious balance of humans and beasts exists a tribe called the Myū that can speak the human language and use powerful magic. Does their power represent a new hope or a new threat? In it, humanity faces the greatest turning point in the history of Philabieldia.

■ Characters

Kai (voiced by Brandon McInnis in English, Yoshimasa Hosoya in Japanese)

The chief of Hitoyori, the earliest human settlement.

As the village’s young leader, he is most concerned with the beast tribe threat and feels he must protect the village at all costs.

To Kai, the Myu are nothing more than another beast tribe, and their magic a threat to the village’s safety.

Hirk (voiced by Nadia Marshall in English, Yukana in Japanese)

A woman of Hitoyori who has spent years studying magic, but has yet to be able to put it to practical use.

She believes magic is the key to Hitoyori’s future—a means by which the village’s children might live to see adulthood—and she seeks to establish relations with the Myu in order to learn from them.

Lyudmila (voiced by Allegra Clark in English, Mamiko Noto in Japanese)

A woman of the Myu who lives in the snow field away from Hitoyori.

Through a certain course of events, she comes to teach magic to the humans. She possesses a strength of will that never gives in, never losing hope even in the face of the cruelest circumstances.

■ System: Faie’s Magic

Scattered around Philabieldiaare structures known as Shrines of the Mystic wherein Faie can learn new magic powers. Elliot will inevitably encounter obstacles impassable without certain magical assistance, so any shrines found are worth a visit.

Wrap Faie in Flames with Ignite

—Light torches, melt ice, detonate explosives—fire magic is indispensable for its myriad of uses.

—Beastmen bombs can be made to go off prematurely with ignite.

Draw in Surrounding Enemies and Objects with Vacuum

—Items and loot dropped by enemies can be vacuumed right up.

—Enemies caught in Faie’s vortex can be attacked or simply deposited off the side of a nearby ledge.

—Turn Faie into a copy of Elliot and mirror his every move, perfect for problem solving: Faie can even press switches as Elliot.

—Not just swords and spears, but bombs and anything else Elliot might throw is copied, so seek out magicite that complements your attacks.

■ System: Combining Attacks and Magic for Expanded Strategies

Elliot’s attacks and Faie’s magic can be combined for synergistic effects and more effective fighting power. Experiment with magicite combinations, too, which play a crucial role.

—Ripe bomb magicite increases explosive damage but delays detonation. With ignite, however, Faie can detonate the enhanced bombs at a touch.

—Extra throw magicite adds a second boomerang to Elliot’s attacks, and Faie can copy that for a total of four boomerangs flying about.

■ A New Demo for All Supported Platforms!

Carry your save data over to the full version of the game in a new prologue demo!

Enjoy the opening chapter of the story with the same freedom of adventure as in the full game.

Progress in the main quest, explore the unknown, or hunt down new weapons and magicite—the future is up to you. Your adventure in Philabieldia, a world filled with discovery, starts here!

■ Demo Play Guide: Elliot’s Actions

As Elliot, the player will freely adventure over the expansive continent of Philabieldia. Various weapons found along the way may be used interchangeably to do battle with beastmen and explore caves and ruins.

Swords

Swords may be swung quickly to attack in a wide range, making them easy to use. Charge up their special attack to send slashes flying!

Shields

Be aware that shields can only defend against frontal attacks, and not those to the back or sides.

Boomerangs

A boomerang is dangerous during its entire flight, so a skillful throw can knock enemies on both the departure and the return.

Bows

A bow’s regular attack fires one arrow per shot, but its special attack fires multiple arrows out in a fan at the cost of a single arrow.

Spears

Spears are good for doling out repeated attacks directly ahead and out of the enemy’s melee range. Their special attack is a forward charge.

Bombs

Bombs explode a short time after they’re set, and their explosions pack a punch. They can also be used to demolish certain rocks and cracked walls.

■ Demo Play Guide: Magicite

Various pieces of magicite you find can be equipped as a set that confers their combined effects to Elliot’s weapons. Find the combinations that suit your playstyle and give you the advantage in battle.

—Magicite is formed at a shop in town from magicite fragments. You won’t know what magicite you’ll get until it’s formed.

—Each piece of magicite has a fixed cost to equip, and you can equip as much as will fit within the total cost available. Experiment and find good magicite combinations.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/the-adventures-of-elliot-the-millennium-tales-details-age-of-budding
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX 3 announced for Switch 2, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch 2

Due out in 2027.

Inti Creates has announced 2D action game sequel Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX 3 for Switch 2 and PC (Steam). It will launch in 2027.

Here are the first details, via Inti Creates:

The third entry in the high-flying 2D action series, Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX 3 sees Copen back in his home world facing a new threat. A mysterious girl appears before him, bringing warnings of otherworldly invaders known as “iX Bearers.” Featuring the same classic 2D action as the previous games, Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX 3 ups the intensity with a new weapon: the twin energy swords, “Divide Edge.”

Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX 3 also brings unprecedented levels of character customization with the “Code Customizer” system, allowing you to build up Copen’s strengths as you see fit, provided you can manipulate the system to your benefit!

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

First Look Trailer

English

Japanese

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/gunvolt-chronicles-luminous-avenger-ix-3-announced-for-switch-2-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Azure Striker Gunvolt Trilogy Enhanced coming to Switch 2 in 2026 alongside DLC ‘Azure Striker Gunvolt GX’
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

A brand-new story mode.

Inti Creates has announced Azure Striker Gunvolt Trilogy Enhanced – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition. It will launch in 2026 with the additional story mode “Azure Striker Gunvolt GX,” which will be released as downloadable content for the existing PlayStation 5 and PC versions.

Azure Striker Gunvolt Trilogy Enhanced first launched for PlayStation 5, Switch, and PC via Steam on July 24, 2025.

Here is an overview of the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, via Inti Creates:

Azure Striker Gunvolt Trilogy Enhanced is a collection of three traditional 2D action platformers, Azure Striker Gunvolt (2014), Azure Striker Gunvolt 2 (2016), and Azure Striker Gunvolt 3 (2022) together in one release, complete with all previously released downloadable content.

The Nintendo Switch 2 Edition adds not only support for high frame rate and resolution displays, but a new story mode called “Azure Striker Gunvolt GX.” Players will control a tag-team duo of Gunvolt and Copen with new weapons and abilities. It also features a new “Inspiration” system, encouraging players to swap between the two heroes at the right time to activate gameplay and score bonuses.

The “Azure Striker Gunvolt GX” story downloadable content is also planned for the PlayStation 5 and Steam versions of the Trilogy Enhanced.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

First Look Trailer

English

Japanese

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/azure-striker-gunvolt-trilogy-enhanced-coming-to-switch-2-in-2026-alongside-dlc-azure-striker-gunvolt-gx
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 1998: The Toll Keeper Story coming to PS5
item.content:encoded:
• PS5

Currently available for PC and Android.

GameChanger Studio will release narrative simulation game 1998: The Toll Keeper Story for PlayStation 5, the developer announced. A release date was not announced.

1998: The Toll Keeper Story first launched for PC via Steam and Android on October 28, 2025.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

You play as Dewi, a pregnant woman working as a toll keeper, caught in the middle of growing civil unrest and financial turmoil in the fictional Southeast Asian country of Janapa. The nation is crumbling—protests erupt, prices skyrocket, and trust in authority fades. Every shift, you inspect vehicles, verify documents, and decide who gets to pass—all while trying to stay safe, keep your job, and protect your unborn child.

You’re not a hero or a fighter—just a regular human being trying to endure overwhelming hardship. But even your smallest decisions carry consequences. Will you follow every rule, or look the other way when someone begs for help? Can you stay strong through fear, uncertainty, and pressure?

Key Features

  • A Story of Survival and Motherhood – Make difficult choices not just for your safety, but also for your unborn child.
  • Narrative Simulation Gameplay – Check vehicles, documents, and identities while managing rising tension and limited resources.
  • Small Decisions, Heavy Consequences – Every action matters: who you let through, who you turn away, what rules you follow or bend.
  • Distinct 90s-Inspired Visual Style – Fusing dot textures, old-paper aesthetics, and a blueish filter, the art direction echoes printed materials from the 90s—grounding the game in the mood and texture of its era.
  • Inspired by True Events – This game is set during the 1998 Asian financial crisis, with Indonesia’s situation serving as one of the primary inspirations. Set in a fictional Southeast Asian country, it explores the fear, chaos, and uncertainty of the era, challenging you to navigate through moral dilemmas where survival demands difficult sacrifices.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

PlayStation 5 Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/1998-the-toll-keeper-story-coming-to-ps5
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: G-MODE Archives+ PAC-MAN announced for Switch, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch

The feature phone version.

G-MODE will release the feature phone version of PAC-MAN as a G-MODE Archives+ title for Switch via Nintendo eShop and PC via Steam in Japan, the company announced. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

The timeless masterpiece that has taken the world by storm is here!

Eating all Pac-Dots while dodging the ghosts!

PAC-MAN

A classic arcade game released in 1980.

An action game where players chase each other through a closed maze.

A port of a Japanese flip phone title (feature phones popular before smartphones).
*This release does not add elements such as languages and achievements that were not part of the original version.

Game Overview

This title is the Japanese flip phone app version of PAC-MAN, the classic game from Bandai Namco Entertainment that has enjoyed the support of many fans since its arcade debut in 1980.

PAC-MAN became a worldwide phenomenon thanks to its simple, easy-to-understand rules, surprisingly deep gameplay, and charming characters.

Game Controls

Control PAC-MAN by moving him up, down, left, and right.

Skillfully avoid being chased through the maze by the four Ghosts: the red Oikake, the pink Machibuse, the light-blue Kimagure, and the orange Otoboke.

Make good use of Power Cookies, which let you fight back against the Ghosts, and clear each round by eating all the Cookies in the maze!



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/g-mode-archives-pac-man-announced-for-switch-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
